long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between cbs01.eq01.sng02 et-0/0/20 <-> cbs01.eq01.tok03 et-0/0/23 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19779
